testcase.name: topUp with zero returns false and does not change balance
hasSufficientFunds returns true when balance is enough
topUp with negative amount returns false
preset top-up amounts are all valid
deduct from zero balance returns false
deduct exact balance amount succeeds and leaves zero balance
hasSufficientFunds returns false when balance is insufficient
hasSufficientFunds returns true for exact balance match
deduct more than balance returns false and does not change balance
topUp with positive amount increases balance correctly
deduct less than balance succeeds and reduces balance
